'''âp-t-l-p''' ('''kapatlepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eschaunge|eschaunge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eschaunge|eschaunge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-l-p
|-
! Lemma
| kapatlepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipatlepoko|thipatlepoko]] || [[word:jipatlepoko|jipatlepoko]] || [[word:shipatlepoko|shipatlepoko]] || [[word:kipatlepoko|kipatlepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupatlepoko|thuthupatlepoko]] || [[word:jujupatlepoko|jujupatlepoko]] || [[word:shushupatlepoko|shushupatlepoko]] || [[word:kukupatlepoko|kukupatlepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupatlepoko|thupatlepoko]] || [[word:jupatlepoko|jupatlepoko]] || [[word:shupatlepoko|shupatlepoko]] || [[word:kupatlepoko|kupatlepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopatlepoko|thothopatlepoko]] || [[word:jojopatlepoko|jojopatlepoko]] || [[word:shoshopatlepoko|shoshopatlepoko]] || [[word:kokopatlepoko|kokopatlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopatlepoko|thopatlepoko]] || [[word:jopatlepoko|jopatlepoko]] || [[word:shopatlepoko|shopatlepoko]] || [[word:kopatlepoko|kopatlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopatlepoko|thopatlepoko]] || [[word:jopatlepoko|jopatlepoko]] || [[word:shopatlepoko|shopatlepoko]] || [[word:kopatlepoko|kopatlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpatlepoko|thĂŠpatlepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpatlepoko|jĂŠpatlepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpatlepoko|shĂŠpatlepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpatlepoko|kĂŠpatlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapatlepoko|thathapatlepoko]] || [[word:jajapatlepoko|jajapatlepoko]] || [[word:shashapatlepoko|shashapatlepoko]] || [[word:kakapatlepoko|kakapatlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapatlepoko|thapatlepoko]] || [[word:japatlepoko|japatlepoko]] || [[word:shapatlepoko|shapatlepoko]] || [[word:kapatlepoko|kapatlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapatlepoko|thapatlepoko]] || [[word:japatlepoko|japatlepoko]] || [[word:shapatlepoko|shapatlepoko]] || [[word:kapatlepoko|kapatlepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
